purpose: PreToolUse hook on Edit|Write that blocks agents from writing to any dashboard other than their assigned one. Resolves the assignment via SYNAPSE_DASHBOARD_ID env var (Electron-spawned CLI) or `DASHBOARD ID:` directive in transcript binding markers (raw CLI). Extracts the dashboard ID from the file_path's `.../dashboards/{id}/...` segment and compares against the assignment. Fail-open if neither source provides an assignment — supports raw CLI usage outside the dashboard binding model. Validates the discovered ID matches dashboard-shape regex (ide | 6-hex | dashboardN) so quoted text in transcripts cannot inject fake assignments.
gotchas: If both SYNAPSE_DASHBOARD_ID and the transcript directive disagree, env var wins (checked first)
Files NOT under dashboards/ are always allowed — this hook only gates dashboard writes
Writes to `dashboards/` (the directory itself, no /{id}/) are allowed (no ID extracted)
Tracker root resolved via $(cd $SCRIPT_DIR/../.. && pwd) — moving the script breaks this
patterns: PreToolUse Edit|Write matcher with stdin tool_input.file_path
Two-source assignment resolution with strict validation regex
conventions: block reason includes both assigned and target IDs plus the source for diagnostics
